REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO HAVE SHANE DUNNE ADJUDGED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT, FOR REQUIREMENT TO POST SECURITY, AND FOR A PREFILING ORDER CONTINUED FROM JAN-08-2026 TO REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTIONS CALENDAR AT FEB-04-2026, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 501. NO LATER THAN JANUARY 23, 2026 MOVING PARTY TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF CITING (WITHOUT ANY ARGUMENT) CASES WHERE (1) A DEFENDANT/RESPONDENT WAS DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PER CCP 391(B)(2) AND/OR (B)(3); AND (2) A DEFENDANT WAS SUBJECT TO A PRE-FILING ORDER CITING CASES THAT DO NOT INVOLVE FAMILY OR PROBATE CODE. SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF SHALL NOT EXCEED 2 PAGES. SHALL BE LIMITED TO CITATIONS WITH NO ARGUMENT. IF NO CASES CAN BE LOCATED AS TO ITEMS (1) AND/OR (2) SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF SHALL STATE "NONE." JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Per Ccp Section 473(A)(1) And 473.5
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Summer Nastich for petitioner 367 Church Street HOA.
Shane Dunne repondent in pro per.

Mr. Dunne contests the courts tentative ruling. Hearing held. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT SHANE DUNNE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Per Ccp Section 473(A)(1) And 473.5 is DENIED. No valid proof of service on file. No basis for vacate the order and the judgment confirming arbitration award.
